Philippines.headline: Green earthquake (Magnitude 6.2M, Depth:67.854km) in Philippines 14/07/2026 15:49 UTC, 30 thousand in MMI VI.
Philippines.description: On 7/14/2026 3:49:41 PM, an earthquake occurred in Philippines potentially affecting 30 thousand in MMI VI. The earthquake had Magnitude 6.2M, Depth:67.854km.

Philippines.headline: Volcanic eruption is on going for Kanlaon in Philippines
Philippines.description: Volcano Kanlaon is emitting ash clouds according to the regional VAAC. The aviation alert level is Green.

Philippines.description: On 13/06/2026, a flood started in Philippines, lasting until 05/07/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 866 displaced .
